mypetroutine.title: Pet care tracker
mypetroutine.description: iOS app on the App Store for tracking daily pet care — feeding, grooming, vet visits.

flamy.title: Habit tracker
flamy.description: iOS habit tracker with streak tracking, milestone badges, and progress charts.

trippack.title: Travel packing app
trippack.description: iOS app that generates AI-powered packing lists based on your destination, trip duration, and activities.

localseo.title: Local SEO site
localseo.description: Multi-district landing page structure targeting Istanbul's countertop market on Google.

surge.title: Distributed load tester
surge.description: HTTP load testing engine — up to 5,000 requests, configurable concurrency, live latency percentiles.

uptime.title: Self-hosted uptime monitor
uptime.description: Real-time uptime monitoring dashboard — response time charts, downtime alerts, and per-minute checks.

cadie.title: Language learning app
cadie.description: Mobile app for learning new languages with spaced repetition and AI-powered feedback.

kitchen.title: AI countertop visualizer

tshirt.title: 3D t-shirt designer
tshirt.description: UV canvas editor with drag, scale & rotate — renders live on a real 3D shirt model with WebGL.

about.label: About
about.bio: 2+ years of professional experience building microservice backends with C# and ASP.NET Core, full-stack web apps with Next.js, and iOS apps with Swift. Focused on AI integrations, distributed systems, and clean architecture.

experience.label: Experience
experience.borusan_desc: Microservice backend for a vehicle rental platform — C#, ASP.NET Core, CQRS/MediatR, RabbitMQ, Quartz.NET, Redis, MongoDB, MSSQL, Docker.
experience.negzel_desc: Internal project management APIs and an RAG-based document search module — embedding, vector database, LLM integration.
